full_text:
Xiu Yun 脩允
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiu Yun (脩允). Tasked with getting barbarians to submit but died of illness. Xiu Yun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xiu Yun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
